message:
fix(core,ondisk): harden e2compr write path with block accounting and cluster validation

Add free_old_cluster_blocks(), proper inode.blocks accounting, cluster
shift validation (2-5), correct sentinel value, block-reuse logic,
and roundtrip test for block reclamation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
